Skill Path: Connections

You are excellent in exploiting your contacts for whatever information you need.

While developing your skills in Diplomacy you chose to focus specifically on Connections, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.4RjDxgvNXNl5GG9d]{Hobnobber}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.IyJyZ1VQxS58Nk6V]{Eyes of the City}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.plBGdZhqq5JBl1D8]{Gather Information}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.4RjDxgvNXNl5GG9d]{Hobnobber}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.IyJyZ1VQxS58Nk6V]{Eyes of the City}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.uF0ATN2Zw1Q67ew2]{Discreet Inquiry}
  • Master: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.6vwLzzrFfeiR9pm0]{Entourage}
  • Legendary: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.A0TNeMNvyY8QpmLz]{Legendary Negotiation}
